These ideas have given rise to the Pre-natal Epoch Theory
for the rectification of the time of birth.
5. By the word 'Epoch' is meant the moment of conception.
The moment of conception is not the same as that of the
discharging of the sperm into the ovary. The spermatoza move
at the rate of half a millimeter per minute • one inch. in an
hour. The rate of the movement depends on the individual
character of the sperm since the quality of the germinating
seed varies from person to person. The interval between the
fecundation and the sex act cannot be known precisely. It can
be seconds or minutes.
